title: G-AntiXray
description: A useful Anti-Xray texture to use in your Minecraft server.
body:
## G-AntiXray
If you're looking to enhance your Minecraft server's protection, **G-AntiXray** is all you need. This technique even work on Vanilla minecraft server.


## Integration into Your Minecraft Server

Integrating G-Anti-Xray texture pack into your own server is simple, you just need to modify server.properties file.


<details>
<summary>Installation steps</summary>

1. Upload the ressource pack to [mc-packs](https://mc-packs.net/)

2. Copy the sha256 and the download links

3. Paste the sha256 and the download link to 
```
server.properties
```

- (Optional) Bookmark this tab and check it often for new updates.

</details>





## Important Note

Keep in mind that while these methods are helpful, **they do not provide a 100% guarantee** against players using X-ray techniques. Players may still find ways to locate ores, so i recommend you to use an [Orebfuscator](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/anti-xray/) if you can.
